title: Origins: Enderxolotl
description: Origin datapack that adds the Enderxolotl, a mix between Merling and Enderian
body:
## 🫧 Enderxolotl 🫧
The Enderxolotl is an interesting mix between a Merling and an Enderian.  
This creature is capable of moving through water at incredible speeds thanks to its torpedo enderpearls!

## ✨Powerlist✨

<details>
<summary>Gills</summary>

Just like the Merling, this Origin breathes water instead of air!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Ender Bubble</summary>

Whenever you want, throw an ender bubble which travels fast underwater. The bubble explodes on contact or after some time, teleporting you to its location.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Unique Eyes</summary>

You can slightly see in the dark, above and underwater.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Slight Aqua Affinity</summary>

You may break blocks underwater almost as fast as others do on land.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Play Dead</summary>

In an instance you would've died, you will be granted some resistance and regeneration but you will move slower.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Fragile</summary>

You have 3 less hearts of health than humans.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Scared of Gourds</summary>

Thanks to your Enderian heritage, you know pumpkins are not to be trusted.

</details>

## Showcase
Thanks a lot to [Krzair](https://www.youtube.com/@KrzairOrigins) for showcasing my Origin!! :D
(at 17:04)
